description: Polygon/Massive rebuild of Gill's TradingView screeners; EPS ignored by request.
notes: When Polygon snapshot day volume is zero, effective volume falls back to previous trading day volume so off-session/holiday runs are not blank.
Premarket volume prefers explicit premarket fields when available, then falls back to same-day volume so frozen morning snapshots still line up.
Penny Morning deliberately bypasses the normal $1/$20 style price floors: it is premarket volume >= 1M, sorted by premarket change percent.
Market cap is fetched only for likely short-screen candidates. Missing market cap passes unless --require-market-cap is used.
This file creates source watchlists. It does not grant trade permission by itself.
